query: DELETE FROM manga WHERE id NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT mangaId FROM chapters WHERE mangaId IS NOT NULL); SELECT COUNT(*) as remaining_manga FROM manga; SELECT COUNT(*) as total_chapters FROM chapters;
